productDisplayName: Puma Women Heritage Quarters Pack of 3 Socks
description: Pack of three pairs of trainer-liner socks in pink, white, black and greyMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneSmall rib at opening to grip below ankle with narrow contrast stripeThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitWear these cute socks with trainers when you're working out.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
